configurations.name: Run Bee.Northwind.Server
configurations.//justMyCode: false so the debugger does not break on UserMessageException — a deliberate business-rule exception (e.g. 'Order details are locked') thrown in a BO and caught by the framework's JsonRpc layer. It is handled; the client receives a friendly message.

configurations.//: Web (Avalonia WASM) head. blazorwasm is the .NET WebAssembly debug type — it builds and runs the WasmAppHost dev server (http://localhost:5200) and attaches the C# debugger through the /_framework/debug proxy, so breakpoints in the shared Bee.Northwind.UI hit in the browser. Needs the wasm-tools workload. Run the backend first — use the 'Server + Web' compound.
configurations.name: Run Bee.Northwind.Browser (WASM)
